_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: SPT + Fika
author: theboss@ericisaboss.com
description: Single Player Tarkov (SPT) server with optional Fika multiplayer mod. Based on https://github.com/zhliau/fika-spt-server-docker.

variables.name: SPT Version
variables.description: SPT release version string. Format: VERSION-EFT_BUILD-GIT_SHA (e.g. 4.0.13-40087-2891fd4). Find valid versions at https://spt-releases.modd.in/

variables.name: Fika Version
variables.description: Fika server mod version to install or validate (e.g. 2.2.6). Only used when FIKA_MODE is not disabled.

variables.name: Fika Mode
variables.description: Controls Fika installation and updates. disabled: no Fika. install: install and validate, abort on version mismatch. auto-update: install and auto-update on mismatch. custom: skip all validation for custom Fika builds.

variables.name: Auto Update SPT
variables.description: Automatically update SPT server files on startup if the installed version does not match SPT_VERSION.

variables.name: Force SPT Version
variables.description: Force a specific SPT version. Format: VERSION-EFT_BUILD-GIT_SHA (e.g. 4.0.1-40087-1eacf0f). Disables AUTO_UPDATE_SPT. Leave blank to use SPT_VERSION normally.

variables.name: Listen On All Networks
variables.description: Set SPT server IP bindings to 0.0.0.0 so the server is reachable inside Pterodactyl. Should be true in almost all cases.

variables.name: Enable Profile Backup
variables.description: Enable a daily cron job that backs up player profiles to the backups/profiles/ directory at midnight UTC.

variables.name: Take Ownership
variables.description: Kept for compatibility with upstream Docker image. Has no functional effect in Pterodactyl.

variables.name: Change Permissions
variables.description: Kept for compatibility with upstream Docker image. Has no functional effect in Pterodactyl.

variables.name: Number of Headless Profiles
variables.description: Auto-generate this many Fika headless client profiles. Requires fika.jsonc to exist (created automatically on first Fika startup). Leave blank to skip.

variables.name: Install Other Mods
variables.description: Enable automatic mod downloader. Downloads and installs mods from MOD_URLS_TO_DOWNLOAD or SPT/mods_download/mod_urls_to_download.txt on each startup.

variables.name: Mod URLs To Download
variables.description: Space-separated list of mod download URLs. Requires INSTALL_OTHER_MODS=true. Supports .zip, .7z, .tar.gz, and .dll files.

variables.name: Timezone
variables.description: Server timezone. Use TZ database identifiers e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London. Leave blank for UTC. See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones
